title: isocoma veneta
intro: Isocoma veneta, also known as Blue Sage or Mountain Balm, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and digestive problems, due to their expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Isocoma veneta include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
